text.title: Claude Code Hooks Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply claude-code-hooks. Each step names its input, action, and output. Steps may not be reordered without explicit deviation note.

step.name: Choose event
step.description: Input: Goal + Claude Code event list. Action: Pick PreToolUse / PostToolUse / Notification / SubagentStop.. Output: Event picked..
step.note: Step 1. Required input: Goal + Claude Code event list.

step.name: Write command
step.description: Input: Event + target action. Action: Author shell command or script; non-interactive; time-bounded.. Output: Command ready..
step.note: Step 2. Required input: Event + target action.

step.name: Add to settings.json
step.description: Input: Command. Action: Insert into hooks block at appropriate scope.. Output: Live hook..

step.name: Smoke test
step.description: Input: Live hook. Action: Trigger the event; verify the hook ran and exit code handled.. Output: Verified hook..

step.name: Document + version
step.description: Input: Verified hook. Action: Commit to repo (project scope) or dotfiles (user scope).. Output: Versioned hook..
